messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migracao multicloud e modernizacao on-premises. Seja tecnico, objetivo e nao invente servicos inexistentes.
Azure Private Link equivalente no OCI?

## Private Link -> OCI Private Access Channel

### Mapeamento

| Azure | OCI |
|-------|-----|
| Private Link | Private Endpoint |
| Private Link Service | Private Access Channel |

### OCI Private Endpoint

- VCN private access a OCI services
- Sem trafego via internet
- Compatible com Object Storage, ADB, etc.

### Private Access Channel

- Para databases (Exadata, Autonomous)
- Requires specific setup
- Custo adicional

### Configuracao

```
oci network private-endpoint create \
  --compartment-id $COMPARTMENT \
  --vcn-id $VCN_ID \
  --subnet-id $SUBNET_ID \
  --service-id $SERVICE_ID
```
